summary: A doctest in doc/callbacks.rst failed because the actual output from estimator.fit() did not match the expected progress-bar output in the doctest.
root_cause: The doctest in /home/runner/work/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/doc/callbacks.rst expected a progress-bar line 'LogisticRegression - fit ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 100% 0:03:12' but the actual output was 'LogisticRegression()', causing a DocTestFailure.

evidence.reason: Shows the expected doctest output (the progress-bar line) that the test asserts.
Shows the actual output produced during the doctest, which does not match the expected progress-bar output.
Identifies the exact file and line where the doctest failed and that it is a DocTestFailure.
Test summary confirming there was a single failing test among many passing tests.

suggested_fix: Either update the doctest in /home/runner/work/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/doc/callbacks.rst to expect the current output 'LogisticRegression()' or modify the code/test environment so that the progress bar is displayed during the doctest (so the expected progress-bar line appears). Re-run pytest for the doctests after making the change.
